audit_items.proof_trace: Property holds: both cached (beaconProposerIndexAtSlotFulu) and fallback paths use PrecomputeProposerIndices computation with identical inputs (same seed via Seed(state,epoch), same active validators for target epoch, same slot encoding). Lookahead indexing correctly maps slot%SlotsPerEpoch for current epoch and SlotsPerEpoch+slot%SlotsPerEpoch for next epoch. Regression test (TestInitializeProposerLookahead_RegressionTest) confirms equivalence across varying validator activation schedules.
